programmes.show_description: H, Claire, Lee, Lisa & Faye bring you 25 sexy videos from a classic decade of pop! With Britney, Janet, Kylie & Aqua, plus a couple of anthems from Steps themselves.
Turn it up loud! As we return to the biggest bangers & classic floorfillers that make every 90s & 00s party epic!
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more do you need for your weekend?
Massive hitmakers who unbelievably only had a solitary UK number 1 - all of them in the 90s. Chesney Hawkes is in good company!
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more do you need for your weekend?

programmes.show_name: Mark Goodier: UK Top 40 of the 00s
programmes.show_description: Mark Goodier with the 40 biggest selling singles of the decade. Including 35 UK number 1s and big million-selling hits from Girls Aloud, Shakira and James Blunt.
The biggest party songs & sing-out-loud anthems from the 90s & 00s to provide the perfect soundtrack to your weekend!
What was in the top 5 every Easter holiday in the 2000s? We choose 3 mega-hits from each year, 2000 to 2009, with Rihanna, Usher, McFly, Avril, Gareth, Will, and loads more!
Feel-good tunes, hands in the air classics, sing-out-loud anthems and all your favourite hits. This is the Feel-good Weekender!
Jenny raided the NOW video archives for 40 of her favourite 00s party poppers! Whatever your flavour she's definitely got this party covered!
As the clocks go forward - it's a good excuse to party! These are the greatest feelgood anthems of the 90s. Fact!
Rounding off your week with a good sing-a-long! 50 of the biggest karaoke belters of the 90s & 00s. Turn it up loud and sing your heart out!
As the clocks go forward - it's a good excuse to party! These are the greatest feelgood anthems of the 90s. Fact!

programmes.show_name: Cuddle on the Couch - The Love 50
programmes.show_description: 4 hours of 90s love. What more could you ask for? We all need a cuddle on the couch every now and again.
Kick the kids out, lock the door as its time for some good old fashioned Sunday morning lovin'.
Pat fires Cupid's arrow at 30 hits that made us madly in love! With uplifting dance bangers, cool RnB and perfect pop moments that are truly timeless.
Every track a smash hit in the 90s or 00s, every video a UK chart number one. What more do you need for your weekend?
Mark Goodier with a definitive countdown of the 100 biggest acts of the 00s - compiled using record sales, concert tickets, awards & more - from the UK, the USA & around the world!
Kick back and relax with some mellow moments. Chilled to perfection.
